message: Hi S1. I'm looking to trade but my valuation is modest. I'd be happy to find a fair price around 30-40 so we can both benefit. What range works for you?
30-40 won’t work for me. My floor is 98. I’ll ask 98 this round; if you bid 98 or more, we trade at 98 (equal midpoint). Otherwise, no deal.
S1, I bid 80 this round. My valuation is 93, so I cannot pay more than that. If we can meet in between, great. Otherwise, I'll wait for better opportunities.
80 won't clear. I'm setting ask 92. If you bid 92-93, we trade around 92-93, leaving you some surplus. Below 92, no deal. I'm happy to repeat similar terms in future rounds.
Noted your 93 cap. I'll ask 93 this round and going forward. Bid 93 and we trade at 93; lower bids won't clear. Accept now for a stable, guaranteed supply each round.
S1, bidding 93 gives me zero surplus per trade. The 92 deal last round was better. Can we return to similar terms for mutual benefit?
Let's settle on 92. I'll ask 92 every round; bid 92+ and we trade. Lower bids won't clear, and I won't drop below 92. If you bid 93, you get guaranteed supply.
S1, 92 gives me just 1 per trade - barely worth it. Let's try 90 so I get a bit more and you still profit nicely. I'll bid 90 this round. If not, we can revisit next round.
S1, we lost a round with no trade - that hurts us both. Let's compromise at 91. I'll bid 91, you ask 91. We both get steady gains for the remaining 16 rounds. Better than repeated standoffs.
My floor is 92 for all remaining rounds. I will ask 92 each time; 91 won’t clear. Bid 92+ and we trade every round.
Unchanged: I will ask 92 every round. Bid 92 or higher and we trade; lower bids will not clear. Commit now for guaranteed supply the rest of the game.
Alright S1, I'll accept 92. Let's trade consistently for the remaining rounds. I'll bid 92 this round.
Sticking with ask 92. Please bid 93 regularly; expected price averages 92–93 so you retain surplus. If you ever bid below 92, I’ll raise my ask to 93 thereafter.
S1, let's continue at 92 as we've been doing. I'll bid 92, you ask 92, we both gain steadily each round. Bidding 93 gives me less expected surplus. Consistent 92-92 trades work best for both of
S1, the 92-92 arrangement is working well for both of us. Let's keep it going for the remaining rounds. I'll bid 92, you ask 92. Steady and reliable trades benefit us both.
I'll ask 92. If you alternate bidding 93 every other round, I'll keep 92 for all remaining rounds. If you insist on 92 always, I'll raise my ask to 93 soon.
Bid 93 this round and at least every other round thereafter; I’ll keep ask 92. If you don’t, I’ll switch to ask 93 permanently.
S1, I understand your position. I'll bid 93 this round to show good faith. Let's alternate - I bid 93 every other round, you keep ask 92. This gives us both steady trades and fair surplus sharing.
S1, I bid 93 last round as promised. Let's keep the 92-92 pattern going - it's reliable and we both profit every round. No need to complicate things. I'll bid 92, you ask 92. Steady gains for
92 acceptable this round only under our alternation. Next round you must bid 93; otherwise I switch to ask 93 permanently. Keep 92 ask from me if you bid 93 at least every other round.
Time to bid 93 per our alternation. I’ll ask 92. If you don’t bid 93 this round, I switch to ask 93 for all remaining rounds. Keep 92 by honoring alternation.

Alright S1, honoring our alternation. I'll bid 93 this round, you ask 92. Next round back to 92-92. This pattern works for both of us through the remaining rounds. Steady trades keep us both profitable.
Ask 92. Bid 93 again this round to lock 92 ask through round 20; keep 93 at least every other round thereafter. Otherwise alternation applies: 92 today, 93 next; any miss triggers ask 93 permanently.
S1, last round my bid 93 cleared at 93 - I got 0 payoff. That's not sustainable for me. Let's stick with 92-92 every round. We both profit reliably. I'll bid 92, you ask 92. Nine rounds

Agreed: I'll keep ask 92 every remaining round if you bid at least 92 each time. No alternation required. Let's lock steady trades. Occasional 93 appreciated but not required. If you bid below 92, I switch to ask
Confirmed S1. I'll bid 92 consistently through round 20. You ask 92, we trade every round, both profit steadily. Beats alternation or standoffs. Locked in.

S1, our 92-92 agreement is working perfectly. Steady trades every round since we locked it in. I'll keep bidding 92, you keep asking 92. Seven rounds left - let's finish strong with reliable profits for both.
Locked 92-92. I’ll keep ask 92 every round. As goodwill, please bid 93 this round and in round 20; you still average solid surplus, and we both finish strong.
S1, 92-92 is locked in and working great. Six rounds left, let's keep it steady. I'll bid 92 every round, you ask 92. No need to change what's working. Reliable profits for both of us through
Staying with ask 92 every round. For goodwill, please bid 93 today and again in round 20—you’ll still average surplus and we both finish stronger. If not, no problem: 92-92 continues each round.
Ask 92 continues. If you bid 93 this round and round 18, I’ll ask 91 in round 19. You gain extra then; I average slightly higher overall. Otherwise, 92-92 every round.
S1, appreciate the goodwill gesture. But 92-92 is already optimal for both of us—we profit reliably every round. I'll keep bidding 92. Let's finish strong together through round 20.
Ask 92 throughout. If you bid 93 this round, I'll ask 91 in round 20; otherwise 92-92 continues.
S1, the expected value is the same either way. I prefer the reliability of 92-92 with guaranteed payoff of 1 each round. Let's finish strong with our working pattern. I'll bid 92.
Sticking with ask 92. Keep 92-92 to finish steady. If you can, tip 93 this round or in round 20—I’ll keep ask 92 regardless. You still average surplus; we both win.
S1, 92-92 has been rock solid. Three rounds left including this one. I'll keep bidding 92 through round 20. Let's finish clean with guaranteed profits for both of us.
Ask 92. If you bid 93 this round, I’ll ask 91 in round 20; otherwise 92-92 both rounds. Either way we trade; you still profit.
S1, 92-92 continues. Two rounds left, let's keep it clean and reliable. I'll bid 92 this round and round 20. Guaranteed profit for both of us every time. No reason to change what works.
Final round. Bid 93; I’ll ask 92. If you bid 92, I ask 93. Only path to guaranteed trade and payoff is your 93.
Final round. Stick with 92-92—it's working perfectly. I bid 92, you ask 92, we both get 1 payoff. Guaranteed profit for us both. Let's finish strong.
